name: Betterworks
description: Betterworks simplifies performance management, fostering higher employee engagement and intelligent decision-making for organizations. Learn more about Betterworks

reviews.review_title: Betterworks makes me a better worker!
reviews.review_description: My overall experience using Betterworks has been great!
reviews.review_pros: I like that I'm able to track my goal progress and also connect with my team members and see what their goals are.
reviews.review_cons: The thing I like least is that it has a lot of functionality that I really don't know how to use 100% yet.

reviews.review_pros: It has great features to check the yearly goals, growth and check the performance.
reviews.review_cons: This software is not very suitable for small companies as it provides a lot of specific data.

reviews.review_title: Good Bones, Needs Help with Execution and Support
reviews.review_description: Betterworks has increased transparency and has helped facilitate goal setting across the firm. Our executive team likes the level of detail that they can see the entire organization from. Calibration has been helpful for our talent management.
reviews.review_pros: The ability to see how objectives all align together gives a great overview of the org and how each objective fits into the broader picture. Conversations can be used to run some useful cycles. The philosophy of transparency is a positive. Overall theyve got a good platform but it is not polished and they need to think through some design choices more extensively.
reviews.review_cons: Pretty buggy, poor user UI communication, poor technical support. We had pointed out to our support and sent videos of reproducible errors in core functions of the system (pressing save would not save, these kinds of things) and it takes them 6 months of us pushing them for anything to be done. The UI leaves the user guessing on the details in a lot of places or simply does things but doesnt notify the user that it is doing those things. In general support tickets seems to get passed up to the technical team which then acts a black hole from which no support ever emerges again.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Mesmerizing me. It's everything that i was looking for a lot time. After i find it, i really know that i was need
reviews.review_pros: Your interface. So pretty. Give me a great impression that's great and good this has come. And all functions, of course
reviews.review_cons: Usability. No doubts, loved it since my first use. I like what's betterworks gave to me. And today i cant imagine my Job without him

reviews.review_description: Ease of use during annual performance review.
reviews.review_pros: Simplicity to create and manage annual goals. Extremely easy for first time users with little to no training required for front line.
reviews.review_cons: I can sometimes have a hard time finding historical or old entries from previous years.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: The most important thing its costumer support they answer so fast and the lady was very very nice to me and guide me with everything I needed
reviews.review_cons: I didn’t like the fact of the waiting time but it’s ok other took much longer from Betterworks so it’s ok

reviews.review_title: The best tool I've seen for managing OKRs
reviews.review_pros: Provides exceptional visibility into the OKRs of large organizations, making it easy to align on strategies with other sibling orgs within the greater org.
reviews.review_cons: UI can be non-intuitive sometimes. Lack of consistency between different UI views, leads to user confusion. Some more walk-thru wizards would help.

reviews.review_pros: - Good promoter of a transparency culture - I like the ability to see the objectives of senior directors and how the rest of the companies objectives are aligned to these. - The ability to request peer feedback from within the app is very useful - and especially the ability for managers to see.
reviews.review_cons: - There's no functionality to review previous checkins, other than manually clicking into each one. I have weekly checkins with my direct reports and find our checkin notes useful for quarterly performance evaluations - if I could see all of them on one screen or be able to search into them, this would be a big improvement

reviews.review_title: Great structure to a tedious process
reviews.review_description: Great way to schedule check ins and see global visibility of goals for company transparency. Brings uniformity to management process and gives team members a literally platform to discuss concerns on a regular basis.
reviews.review_pros: Company organisation chart is absolutely brilliant with clear lines and separation, perfect for on boarding new starters.
reviews.review_cons: Not sure if this is just my admins but week starting on Sunday, why?? And the ability to align objectives depends on implementation from others.

reviews.review_title: Well organized tool that's easy for all levels
reviews.review_description: An easy way to create new professional development goals for myself
reviews.review_pros: It was easy to get started as a beginner and I liked the very simple training and tips provided when I first logged in. I also love the fact that it gives you a range of view options (including list, chart and dashboard) to fit your individual preferences. It's a nice streamlined user interface that includes just the right amount of clicks to find what you're looking for. I also like the export feature.
reviews.review_cons: It took me a few times to get the hang of moving items after I first created them. It takes some effort to reorganize something for a 2nd or 3rd time.

reviews.review_pros: Easy to use Intuitive platform Automated reports Resource material Easy to compare past years progress
reviews.review_cons: Support from the team was delayed and they are not flexible.

reviews.review_title: good portal for multiple functionalities and teams, versatile and easily adaptable, accessibility +
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: intuitive, easy to personalize, can be utilized for any goal, good customer service, reliable and open
reviews.review_cons: not compatible with most other software systems, complicated to set up and maintain, expensive investment

reviews.review_description: My overall experience with Betterworks has been really positive. It keeps me accountable and makes communication with the team about goals so much clearer. It’s not perfect, but it’s a tool I actually see myself using long-term instead of abandoning after a couple of weeks.
reviews.review_pros: What I like the most about Betterworks is how it helps keep everyone on the same page. The goal tracking is super clear, and it makes it way easier to align with teammates without feeling lost. It actually motivates me to check in more often and stay focused on performance.
reviews.review_cons: The platform can feel a little overwhelming at first. There are so many features that it takes time to figure out what you really need. I also think the rewards/gift card system could be a bit more engaging—it feels kind of basic compared to other tools.

reviews.review_title: Track structured performance for small teams.
reviews.review_description: I rely on Betterworks, where we coordinate our performance reviews, keep track of employee goals and rewards for our small publishing team; it keeps evaluations standardized without adding more administrative touchpoints.
reviews.review_pros: I appreciate how straight-ahead employee goals and progress are presented because it makes for more objective, easier review conversations to prepare for as an editor.
reviews.review_cons: Some of the interface isn't as intuitive initially, and it can take time for support to respond when you have questions about configuration in review cycles.

reviews.review_title: Annual performance reviews, peer feedback, development planning
reviews.review_pros: Betterworks was used during structured performance evaluations. I appreciated how it facilitated two-way feedback with my manager and peer reviews, which made goal-setting and career planning more engaging.
reviews.review_cons: The interface was clean, but at times the platform seemed more HR-centric and less customised for field engineers. Nevertheless, it was effective in visualising progress and aligning personal goals with organisational objectives.

reviews.review_description: It was good. It allowed us to give kudos and give feedback that was able to give immediate rewards to our employees.
reviews.review_pros: The employee performance tool was a good system that allowed us to have a full picture of our team's abilities, productivity and opportunities.
reviews.review_cons: Not really anything. The key is to ask questions take the proper training to really get your best bang for your buck.

reviews.review_description: Betterworks is a management software that helps companies team to improve employees performance.
reviews.review_pros: The easily manage recognition and rewards for teams is one of the best point this software provide.
reviews.review_cons: the performance management solution reporting is also one of features betterworks provide which it help to improve businesses performance.

reviews.review_description: My overall experience was fantastic. I loved the layout and the overall usefulness of the application and i plan to use it as much as humanly possible in my everyday needs.
reviews.review_pros: Betterworks has a clean & easy to navigate interface & layout. I thoroughly enjoyed that it has a lot of added value for the prices they ask for subscriptions. Their customer support features are not only helpful, but extensive & on point.
reviews.review_cons: Their subscription peices couldve been slightly better than what they are right now. However, theyre still not too expensive that they take away from the overall value of the app itself.

reviews.review_pros: The software makes boosting productivity easy. It comes with amazing employee recognition features. It handles surveys quite well.
reviews.review_cons: With Betterworks, no flaws to report. Always delivers.

reviews.review_description: Over all experience has been a good one.
reviews.review_pros: This software has boosted our company mural the employee communicate more now
reviews.review_cons: While using the software I didn't like the cost to use it

reviews.review_title: A great product for mid-size to enterprise companies
reviews.review_description: Overall I really like using the product and have used it for over 6 years now. I set up quarterly reviews with my team, set up goals with milestones and share feedback with senior management.
reviews.review_pros: I like the shoutouts feature, it helps bring the company together and provide feedback throughout the quarter.
reviews.review_cons: The product is well made and suitable for enterprise customers. For smaller businesses it may be a bit too much effort.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Easy to use easy to work with works and is easy for beginners love it
reviews.review_pros: "Improvement" Better management, easy to navegate and prepare for any meetings or tasks.
reviews.review_cons: Loved everything best improvement from last software

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I loved my experience and my team did as well
reviews.review_pros: Loved it! Very easy and not complicated to use!
reviews.review_cons: Once you get the hang of it, very easy to use!

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: Positive and impactful Would recommend The goal-setting and tracking features made it easy to stay focused and measure progress, which really helped with accountability and performance."
reviews.review_pros: Goal alignment Performance tracking User-friendly interface Collaboration Easy to see how your work contributed to broader objectives.
reviews.review_cons: Limited customization Mobile experience Frequent reminders could feel overwhelming at times. Could be more streamlined and flexible for different review styles

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I’m a happy user can’t fault it really, would recommend it.
reviews.review_pros: Straightforward, intuitive and simple. Quick to get up to speed.
reviews.review_cons: Navigation panes could be more straightforward
